name: ToolbarSpacer
description: An invisible flexible spacer that fills available space inside a Toolbar or OverflowToolbar. Pushes subsequent items to the right (or left in RTL). Essential for the standard toolbar layout: Title → ToolbarSpacer → action Buttons.

props.name: width
props.description: Optional fixed width. Leave empty (default) for flexible/fill behavior — the spacer expands to fill all remaining space between preceding and following items.

notes: Always place between the title/label items and the action buttons to right-align actions.
Only one ToolbarSpacer per toolbar is needed in most cases — two spacers split the remaining space equally.
Has no visual representation — it is invisible.
ToolbarSpacer has no accessibility role — it is invisible and not focusable.

examples.title: Standard toolbar with spacer pushing actions to the right
whenToUse: Inside every OverflowToolbar to separate title from action buttons
To right-align action buttons in a toolbar
whenNotToUse: Do not use outside of Toolbar or OverflowToolbar
